<value name="IRTNODE_PROPERTY"></value>



BRAVESEARCH_API_KEY=BSAaa_ik9paksjfhgjfzazSHRJFvETx



# Data - DataPlatform - Dagster

resource "vault_generic_secret" "data_dataplatform_postgresql_dagster_db" {
  path = "platform/${var.region}/data/dataplatform/postgresql/dagster/db"

  data_json = <<EOT
{
  "host": "postgresql-dagster.dataplatform.data.${var.region}.${local.env}.xbaws.com",
  "port": "${data.aws_rds_cluster.data_dataplatform_postgresql_dagster.port}",
  "database": "${postgresql_database.data_dataplatform_dagster.name}"
}
EOT
}

resource "postgresql_role" "data_dataplatform_dagster" {
  name            = data.vault_generic_secret.data_dataplatform_postgresql_dagster_user.data["username"]
  login           = true
  password        = data.vault_generic_secret.data_dataplatform_postgresql_dagster_user.data["password"]
  create_database = "false"
}

resource "postgresql_database" "data_dataplatform_dagster" {
  name             = "dagster"
  owner            = postgresql_role.data_dataplatform_dagster.name
  template         = "template0"
  lc_collate       = "en_US.UTF-8"
  lc_ctype         = "en_US.UTF-8"
  encoding         = "UTF8"
  connection_limit = -1
}

resource "postgresql_grant" "data_dataplatform_dagster" {
  role        = postgresql_role.data_dataplatform_dagster.name
  database    = postgresql_database.data_dataplatform_dagster.name
  schema      = "public"
  object_type = "table"
  privileges  = ["ALL"]

  lifecycle {
    ignore_changes = [privileges] # FIXME: https://github.com/cyrilgdn/terraform-provider-postgresql/issues/303
  }
}
